issues.title: High number of scripts and CSS files
issues.impact: Slower page load (2.7s) and potential layout shifts; higher bounce on mobile.
issues.solution: Combine/minify CSS and JS, defer non-critical scripts, enable HTTP/2, use critical CSS.
issues.description: The page loads 43 scripts and 8 CSS files, increasing load time and blocking rendering.

issues.title: Potential missing alt text for images
issues.impact: Screen-reader users lose context; SEO impact.
issues.solution: Add meaningful alt text to all content images; decorative images should have empty alt="".
issues.description: Only 3 images present; screenshots indicate no visible alt tags. Images may lack descriptive alt attributes.

issues.title: Weak CTA prominence
issues.impact: Lower conversion and click-through on key actions.
issues.solution: Increase CTA size, contrast, and place above the fold; use distinct accent color and whitespace.
issues.description: Primary CTAs (Shop Now, Contact Us) are not prominent enough in the hero and fold areas.

issues.title: Inconsistent font sizes and weight
issues.impact: Cognitive load and perceived unpolished design.
issues.solution: Define a clear typographic scale and apply site-wide. Ensure legible base font size (16px) on mobile.
issues.description: Headings and body text sizes/weights vary across screenshots, reducing readability and brand consistency.

issues.title: Navigation density and link clarity
issues.impact: Slower task completion and possible mis-clicks.
issues.solution: Simplify top-level nav, group product subpages under a single 'Products' menu with clear labels.
issues.description: Navigation includes many similar items (Dog Food, Gold Formula Dog Food, Blue Formula Dog Food). Users may be unsure where to go.

issues.title: Potential cramped layout on mobile
issues.impact: Touch errors and poorer readability on small screens.
issues.solution: Increase touch target sizes, ensure 16px base font, add adequate padding and spacing.
issues.description: Mobile screenshot indicates content density; CTAs and text may be too close to screen edges.

recommendations.title: Reduce render-blocking resources
recommendations.description: Audit scripts/CSS and defer or async non-critical JS; inline critical CSS for above-the-fold content.
recommendations.testingNotes: Measure before/after with Lighthouse and WebPageTest.
recommendations.implementation: Use build tools (Webpack/Gulp) to concatenate and minify; add rel=preload for fonts/assets.
recommendations.expectedImprovement: Lower TTFB and faster first meaningful paint; reduce bounce rate.

recommendations.title: Add descriptive alt text and ARIA where needed
recommendations.description: Provide accessible names for images and interactive elements; ensure semantic HTML.
recommendations.testingNotes: Verify with NVDA/VoiceOver and axe results.
recommendations.implementation: Update CMS/templates to include alt attributes; run automated a11y scans (axe).
recommendations.expectedImprovement: Improved screen reader experience and SEO.

recommendations.title: Make primary CTAs more prominent
recommendations.description: Style CTAs with a high-contrast accent color, sufficient padding, and clear copy (e.g., 'Shop Now — Free Delivery').
recommendations.testingNotes: A/B test button color, size, and wording to measure CTR lift.
recommendations.implementation: Update CSS variables for CTA styles; place CTA in hero and sticky header.
recommendations.expectedImprovement: Higher CTR on primary actions; lift in conversions.

recommendations.title: Simplify navigation and group related pages
recommendations.description: Consolidate product pages under one menu and use clear categories.
recommendations.testingNotes: Tree-testing or card sorting with sample users.
recommendations.implementation: Create 'Products' parent nav with 'Gold' and 'Blue' as sub-items; add breadcrumbs on product pages.
recommendations.expectedImprovement: Faster findability and reduced user friction.

recommendations.title: Improve spacing and touch targets
recommendations.description: Increase tap target sizes to at least 44px and add more whitespace around buttons and links.
recommendations.testingNotes: Run usability tests on iOS and Android devices.
recommendations.implementation: Adjust CSS for mobile breakpoints and test on real devices.
recommendations.expectedImprovement: Fewer touch errors and improved mobile conversion.

conversionOpportunities.improvement: Improve contrast, copy, and placement above-the-fold.
conversionOpportunities.testingRecommendation: A/B test CTA color and copy with 2 variants over 2 weeks.

conversionOpportunities.improvement: Add descriptive captions, quick view, and clearer click affordance.
conversionOpportunities.testingRecommendation: Run an experiment adding 'View Details' overlays on hover/tap.
